spending.headline: Reduce Monthly Spend
spending.description: Your average monthly spending for January to March was INR 9,933, about 11% lower than your December spending of INR 11,200.

spending.headline: Manage Food Spending
spending.description: Your average monthly food spending increased by 50% to INR 2300 in the last three months, compared to INR 1533 in the prior three-month period.

spending.headline: Focus Delivery Spends
spending.description: You spent INR 1560 on food and quick commerce from Zomato and Blinkit, accounting for 15.8% of your total spending in the last 30 days.

spending.headline: Manage Weekend Spends
spending.description: Your recent weekend spending has noticeably increased compared to your past six-month average. This indicates a greater proportion of your expenses are now concentrated on weekends.

spending.headline: No Subscriptions Detected
spending.description: We haven't detected any recurring subscription payments in your transactions over the past year. This means you have no recurring charges.

spending.headline: Strengthen Liquidity
spending.description: You currently have no reported liquid investments like MFs or FDs. With a surplus in only 5 of the last 12 months, consider building a more consistent financial buffer.

spending.headline: Optimize UPI Spends
spending.description: Your UPI debits average 7 transactions monthly with a ticket size of INR 457 over the last three months, indicating frequent, smaller payments.

spending.headline: Jaipur Discom Bill Up
spending.description: Your latest Jaipur Discom bill of INR 420 is about 5% higher than your last 4-month average of INR 399. Monitor usage to manage future costs.
